tasks.name: Create Feature Branch
tasks.description: Create a feature branch for implementation

tasks.name: Design Interface
tasks.description: Design API specification and data models

arguments.prompt:
Design the interface specification based on this issue:

Title: ${$.get_issue.output.title}
Body: ${$.get_issue.output.body}

Create:
1. API specification (endpoints, request/response formats)
2. Data models (database schema)
3. UI component interfaces

Write the specification to docs/interface-spec.md

tasks.name: Generate Test Cases (TDD: Red)
tasks.description: Generate test cases from interface specification before implementation

arguments.prompt:
Read the interface specification from docs/interface-spec.md.

Test framework: jest
Test command: npm test

Generate comprehensive test cases BEFORE implementation (TDD approach):

1. **Database tests**:
   - Schema validation
   - CRUD operations
   - Constraints and relationships

2. **API tests**:
   - Endpoint contracts
   - Request/response validation
   - Error handling
   - Authentication/authorization

3. **UI tests**:
   - Component rendering
   - User interactions
   - Form validation

Use the appropriate file naming convention and syntax for the specified test framework.
These tests should FAIL initially (Red phase of TDD).
Write tests that verify the interface contracts defined in the spec.

tasks.name: Setup Git Worktrees
tasks.description: Create separate worktrees for parallel development to avoid conflicts

args.command: cd /tmp/task-composer-test && git add -A && git commit -m 'Add interface spec and tests' --allow-empty && ISSUE=5 && git worktree add ../worktrees/db -b feature/issue-$ISSUE-db && git worktree add ../worktrees/api -b feature/issue-$ISSUE-api && git worktree add ../worktrees/ui -b feature/issue-$ISSUE-ui && echo '{"db_path": "../worktrees/db", "api_path": "../worktrees/api", "ui_path": "../worktrees/ui"}'

tasks.name: Implementation Loop (TDD: Green)
tasks.description: Implement in separate worktrees until all tests pass (max 5 iterations)

tasks.name: Implement/Fix Database
tasks.description: Implement or fix database layer in dedicated worktree

arguments.prompt:
Iteration: ${$.loop.iteration}
First iteration: ${$.loop.first}

Goal: Make the database tests pass (TDD Green phase).

Working directory: worktrees/db (isolated worktree)
Test command: npm test

1. Read docs/interface-spec.md for the specification
2. Find and read the database test files to understand what tests need to pass
3. If first iteration: Implement the database layer to pass the tests
4. If not first iteration: Fix based on test failures:
${$.loop.previous.run_tests.output.stdout}

Focus on database layer only. Write minimal code to pass the tests.
Commit your changes when done.

tasks.name: Implement/Fix API
tasks.description: Implement or fix API layer in dedicated worktree

arguments.prompt:
Iteration: ${$.loop.iteration}
First iteration: ${$.loop.first}

Goal: Make the API tests pass (TDD Green phase).

Working directory: worktrees/api (isolated worktree)
Test command: npm test

1. Read docs/interface-spec.md for the specification
2. Find and read the API test files to understand what tests need to pass
3. If first iteration: Implement the API layer to pass the tests
4. If not first iteration: Fix based on test failures:
${$.loop.previous.run_tests.output.stdout}

Focus on API layer only. Write minimal code to pass the tests.
Commit your changes when done.

tasks.name: Implement/Fix UI
tasks.description: Implement or fix UI layer in dedicated worktree

arguments.prompt:
Iteration: ${$.loop.iteration}
First iteration: ${$.loop.first}

Goal: Make the UI tests pass (TDD Green phase).

Working directory: worktrees/ui (isolated worktree)
Test command: npm test

1. Read docs/interface-spec.md for the specification
2. Find and read the UI test files to understand what tests need to pass
3. If first iteration: Implement the UI layer to pass the tests
4. If not first iteration: Fix based on test failures:
${$.loop.previous.run_tests.output.stdout}

Focus on UI layer only. Write minimal code to pass the tests.
Commit your changes when done.

tasks.name: Merge Worktrees
tasks.description: Merge all worktree branches, detecting conflicts

args.command: cd /tmp/task-composer-test && ISSUE=5 && CONFLICT=false && (git merge feature/issue-$ISSUE-db --no-edit -m 'Merge db' >/dev/null 2>&1 || CONFLICT=true) && (git merge feature/issue-$ISSUE-api --no-edit -m 'Merge api' >/dev/null 2>&1 || CONFLICT=true) && (git merge feature/issue-$ISSUE-ui --no-edit -m 'Merge ui' >/dev/null 2>&1 || CONFLICT=true) && if [ "$CONFLICT" = "true" ]; then echo '{"has_conflict": true}'; else echo '{"has_conflict": false}'; fi

tasks.name: Check and Resolve Merge Conflicts
tasks.description: Check for merge conflicts and resolve if any exist

arguments.prompt:
Check if there are any merge conflicts.

1. Run 'git status' to check for conflicts
2. If NO conflicts: respond 'No conflicts to resolve' and you're done
3. If conflicts exist:
   - Read each conflicting file
   - Read docs/interface-spec.md for the specification
   - Resolve conflicts intelligently
   - Stage resolved files with 'git add'
   - Complete the merge with 'git commit'

tasks.name: Run Tests
tasks.description: Run test suite on merged code

tasks.name: Analyze Test Results
tasks.description: Use AI to intelligently analyze test output and determine pass/fail

arguments.prompt:
Analyze the following test output and determine if ALL tests passed.

Test framework: jest
Test output:
```
${$.run_tests.output.stdout}
```

Look for indicators like:
- 'passed', 'ok', 'success', 'PASS' for success
- 'failed', 'error', 'FAIL', 'failure' for failures
- Exit codes, test counts, error messages

IMPORTANT: Your response MUST end with exactly one of these markers:
- ALL_TESTS_PASSED (if all tests passed)
- TESTS_FAILED (if any test failed)

tasks.name: Check Test Result
tasks.description: Parse analyze_results output to determine pass/fail

args.command: cd /tmp/task-composer-test && ISSUE=5 && git worktree remove ../worktrees/db --force && git worktree remove ../worktrees/api --force && git worktree remove ../worktrees/ui --force && git branch -D feature/issue-$ISSUE-db feature/issue-$ISSUE-api feature/issue-$ISSUE-ui && echo '{"cleaned": true}'

tasks.name: Create Pull Request
tasks.description: Create a pull request for the feature

action.title: ${$.get_issue.output.title}
action.head: feature/issue-5
action.body:
## Summary
Implementation for Issue #5

## Related Issue
Closes #5

## TDD Approach
- Interface Design: docs/interface-spec.md
- Test Framework: jest
- Test Command: npm test
- Implementation: Parallel development using git worktrees

## Test Results
```
${$.implementation_loop.output.run_tests.output.stdout}
```
